{{Quote|When are we gonna be Jedi Knights, like you, with magic? When you gonna teach us to use the Force?|Dracos, speaking to Luke Skywalker|<ref name="M" />}}
'''Dracos''', a [[Lizard Warrior]],<ref name="JMM" /> was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who was part of a group of recruits that [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was given charge of to train just after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. While giving them basic field and combat training, Skywalker never ventured into teaching about [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]; Dracos and a number of the other trainees were frustrated by this. According to Skywalker, he was cautious about teaching the techniques required which could possibly lead to the creation of another fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], as was experienced with his father, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]].<ref name="M" />
